name: What if the machine accident was kinda my fault at work?

mainEntity.name: What if the machine accident was kinda my fault at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Still get full workers comp; no-fault system.
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp is no-fault; you still get benefits even if partially responsible.[3][9] Only total intentional misconduct bars claim.[1] Key factors: Comparative fault doesn't reduce comp but affects third-party suits. Document training received. Idaho/Utah follow no-fault rule strictly.

description: Still get full workers comp; no-fault system.
